Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer

Interface ISequentTransformer

All Known Subinterfaces:
ISequentTranslator
All Known Implementing Classes:
IdentifierDecomposer, LanguageFilter, SequentDatatypeTranslator, SequentExtensionRemover, SequentExtensionTranslator, SequentSimplifier, SequentTranslator
public interface ISequentTransformer
Common protocol describing a predicate transformer that can be applied to sequents. When applied to a sequent, method transform is called on each predicate of the sequent and a new sequent is created with the transformed predicates.

The formula factory to use during transformation should be obtained by the transformer through other means (e.g., obtained from the simple sequent to which this transformer is applied).

An alternative richer version of this interface is available: ISequentTranslator.

Since:
2.3
See Also:
  • ISimpleSequent.apply(ISequentTransformer)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Predicate
    transform(ITrackedPredicate predicate)
    Transforms a predicate into another predicate.

  • Method Details

    • transform

      Predicate transform(ITrackedPredicate predicate)
      Transforms a predicate into another predicate. In some context, it might be assumed that the original and transformed predicates are equivalent or equisatisfiable. However, such assumption is not part of the contract of this method and must be enforced at a higher level.

      A null value can be returned to indicate that this transformer cannot handle the given predicate.

      Parameters:
      predicate - tracked predicate to transform
      Returns:
      a transformed predicate or null
